basis: IRIS "A command has been used improperly in this context, such as an argumentless GoTo in a routine" matches AnnoStd M45 "invalid Goto reference"
IRIS "Divide by zero attempted" matches AnnoStd M9 "divide by zero"
IRIS error for "an unknown intrinsic function or special variable" — partial match to ANSI parameter-related codes
IRIS list-operation error; loose match to AnnoStd M19 "cannot copy a tree or subtree into itself"
IRIS "MAXNUMBER" arithmetic overflow matches AnnoStd M28 "mathematical function, parameter out of range"
IRIS "MAXSTRING" string-too-long error; loose match to ANSI string-length codes
IRIS "NAKED indicator undefined" matches AnnoStd M1 "naked indicator undefined"
IRIS "Line not found" matches AnnoStd M13 "invalid lineref (line not found)"
IRIS "Routine not found" relates to AnnoStd M14 "line level not 1"
IRIS "$Select error: no condition true" matches AnnoStd M4 "no true condition in $Select"
IRIS "STORE failure"; loose match to capacity errors
IRIS "SUBSCRIPT" invalid subscript matches AnnoStd M38 "invalid ssvn subscript"
IRIS "Syntax error" relates to AnnoStd M45 "invalid Goto reference" (broader)
IRIS "UNDEFINED" reference to undefined local/global; matches AnnoStd M6 "undefined lvn" (and M7 for globals; v0.2 picks M6 as primary)
